name: popover
title: Popover
description: Floating popover panel anchored to a trigger, with smart collision detection.
author: ParticleUI

files.content:
"use client"

import * as React from "react"
import * as PopoverPrimitive from "@radix-ui/react-popover"

const Popover = PopoverPrimitive.Root
const PopoverTrigger = PopoverPrimitive.Trigger
const PopoverAnchor = PopoverPrimitive.Anchor

const PopoverContent = React.forwardRef<
  React.ElementRef<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Content>,
  React.ComponentPropsWithoutRef<typeof PopoverPrimitive.Content>
>(({ className, align = "center", sideOffset = 6, ...props }, ref) => (
  <PopoverPrimitive.Portal>
    <PopoverPrimitive.Content
      ref={ref}
      align={align}
      sideOffset={sideOffset}
      className={[
        "z-50 w-72 rounded-xl border border-[var(--color-border)] bg-[var(--color-surface-2)]",
        "p-4 text-[var(--color-text-1)]",
        "shadow-[0_8px_32px_0px_oklch(0%_0_0_/_0.5)]",
        "outline-none",
        "data-[state=open]:animate-in data-[state=open]:fade-in-0 data-[state=open]:zoom-in-95",
        "data-[state=closed]:animate-out data-[state=closed]:fade-out-0 data-[state=closed]:zoom-out-95",
        "data-[side=bottom]:slide-in-from-top-2 data-[side=left]:slide-in-from-right-2",
        "data-[side=right]:slide-in-from-left-2 data-[side=top]:slide-in-from-bottom-2",
        className,
      ]
        .filter(Boolean)
        .join(" ")}
      {...props}
    />
  </PopoverPrimitive.Portal>
))
PopoverContent.displayName = PopoverPrimitive.Content.displayName

export { Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent, PopoverAnchor }
